series_metadata.series_title: EMPLOYEES SUBSTITUTE WAGE AND TAX STATEMENT
series_metadata.series_description: This form is used by taxpayers who have been unable to obtain a form W-2 or IT-2 from their employers. This form is attached to the IT-1040. This form is filed as required and is a one part form.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: records in office files IT1040 is destroyed, . If scanned, . ; Electronic: records in office files IT1040 is destroyed
